title: Smarter Chutes (Create)
description: Keeps the 3D appearance of Create Mod smart chutes without giving up the new textures (Create 0.5.1)
body:
## Re-3D-ified
The most recent version of Create adds in a whole slew of new features and even overhauls old textures and models - one of them being the smart chute. While some think the change was very much needed, others (including myself) miss the old design. This small resource pack reverts the model of smart chutes to its pre-0.5.1 design while incorporating the new textures to keep the block from looking too out of place.


![Gallery Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FslqwtOG/images/6faa19a67fb4a9eb213989493fca184af5054e5f.png)
